zh-CN.meta_title: 免费情商 EQ 测试 | 情绪与关系模式报告
zh-CN.meta_description: 完成 60 道自我报告题，理解自我觉察、情绪调节、共情理解和关系管理。结果免费，边界清晰，不用于诊断、招聘或能力认证。
zh-CN.h1: 情商 EQ 测试：情绪与关系模式报告
zh-CN.dek: 一份 60 题 self-report 测评，用于解释你如何感知、调节和回应自己与他人的情绪。
zh-CN.entity_summary: 费马 EQ-60 是情绪与关系信号模块，输出自我报告型情绪与关系模式报告，而不是临床、招聘或认证能力测验。

content_modules.heading: 测评测什么
content_modules.summary: 自我觉察、情绪调节、共情理解和关系管理四个维度。

content_modules.heading: 结果页给什么
content_modules.summary: 综合指数、四维矩阵、核心洞察、现实场景、行动处方和科学边界。

content_modules.heading: 不做什么
content_modules.summary: 不做临床诊断、招聘筛选、职业适配结论或客观能力认证。

faq.question: 这是免费的情商测试吗？
faq.answer: 是。EQ-60 基础报告免费；报告深度由完成的数据决定，不由付费门槛决定。

faq.question: 它是能力测验吗？
faq.answer: 不是。它基于自我报告，适合自我理解、沟通反思和成长规划。

faq.question: 未来的情境判断模块是什么？
faq.answer: EQ-SJT 16 目前仅为 planned 状态，未来会补充情境选择信息，但不会被表述为认证能力测验。

zh-CN.llms_summary: EQ-60 是费马测试的自我报告型情绪与关系模式测评。它用 60 道题解释自我觉察、情绪调节、共情理解和关系管理，并输出免费结果页。
zh-CN.claim_boundary: 仅用于自我理解和成长规划；不用于临床诊断、招聘筛选、职业适配承诺、治疗建议或客观能力认证。
zh-CN.source_authority: 页面标题、SEO 摘要、FAQ、结构化数据边界和 LLM 摘要以 backend content pack 为权威来源。
no_go_claims: 不声称测量客观情绪能力

en.meta_title: Free EQ Test | Emotional & Relational Pattern Report
en.meta_description: Take a free 60-item self-report EQ test covering self-awareness, emotion regulation, empathy, and relationship management. Clear boundaries: not clinical, hiring, or certified ability assessment.
en.h1: EQ Test: Emotional & Relational Pattern Report
en.dek: A 60-item self-report assessment that explains how you notice, regulate, and respond to emotions in yourself and in relationships.
en.entity_summary: FermatMind EQ-60 is an emotional and relational signal module. It produces a self-report pattern report, not a clinical, hiring, or certified ability assessment.

content_modules.heading: What it measures
content_modules.summary: Self-awareness, emotion regulation, empathic understanding, and relationship management.

content_modules.heading: What the report includes
content_modules.summary: A global index, four-dimension matrix, core insight, real-world scenes, action prescription, and scientific boundary.

content_modules.heading: What it does not do
content_modules.summary: It does not provide clinical diagnosis, hiring suitability, career-fit promises, or objective ability certification.

faq.question: Is this EQ test free?
faq.answer: Yes. The EQ-60 base report is free; report depth is based on completed data, not a paywall.

faq.question: Is this an ability test?
faq.answer: No. It is based on self-report and is intended for self-understanding, communication reflection, and growth planning.

faq.question: What is the future scenario module?
faq.answer: EQ-SJT 16 is currently planned only. It will add scenario-choice information in the future, without being positioned as a certified ability assessment.

en.llms_summary: EQ-60 is FermatMind's self-report emotional and relational pattern assessment. It uses 60 items to explain self-awareness, emotion regulation, empathic understanding, and relationship management, then returns a free result page.
en.claim_boundary: For self-understanding and growth planning only; not for clinical diagnosis, hiring selection, career-fit promises, treatment advice, or objective ability certification.
en.source_authority: Page title, SEO summary, FAQ, structured-data boundary, and LLM summary are authoritative in the backend content pack.
no_go_claims: Does not claim objective emotional ability measurement
